description: A plant physiologist has provided a raw image of a leaf specimen located at '~/Fiji_Data/raw/botany/leaf_specimen.jpg'. The image contains a reference line labeled '2 cm'. Calibrate the image scale using the reference line and segment the leaf from the background to measure its morphological traits: Area, Perimeter, Circularity, and Feret's Diameter. Ensure all measurements are recorded in physical units (cm/cm²). Burn a visual scale bar onto the image and save the following outputs: the measurements table to '~/Fiji_Data/results/botany/measurements.csv', the annotated image with the scale bar to '~/Fiji_Data/results/botany/annotated_leaf.png', and the binary mask used for measurement to '~/Fiji_Data/results/botany/leaf_mask.png'.
